© Knomee | ConfidentialPage 2
ContentsHotWarmEngagedDisengagedAppendix
What is Knomee?

Knomee helps advisors convert the right prospects faster by powering more personalized conversations. Behavioral intelligence flows directly into existing workflows — giving wealth firms greater efficiency, engagement, and retention.

Challenges Facing Advisors

Traditional outreach relies on generalized messaging that misses the emotional context behind financial decisions.

Without behavioral insight, advisors spend time on low-intent prospects — leading to lower conversion and longer sales cycles.

Maintaining alignment with existing clients is a challenge, and business is often lost during life events.

How Knomee Solves It

Prospects complete a 10-minute research-backed experience to articulate their goals and top 3 money questions before the conversation begins.

Responses generate a 0–100 Advisor Readiness Score to help firms identify high-intent prospects and prioritize advisor time.

The advisor receives an AI-powered Prospect Playbook with language to use and avoid, conversation starters, and answers to the prospect's top money questions.

Knomee's Impact
01

Builds trust and delivers value before asking for financial data.

02

Delivers a differentiated experience centered on the individual's goals, values, and motivations.

03

Refines language to address the prospect's needs and values.

04

Aligns ensemble teams with consistent, scalable, and structured understanding.

05

Discovers what has changed for a household since the last conversation.

© Knomee | ConfidentialPage 3

Knomee Drives Prospect & Client Engagement

Knomee supports advisor growth from the first prospect touch through the entire relationship lifecycle — helping attract prospects, accelerate conversion, and deepen client engagement over time.

Use Case / Stage
Prospect Mindset
Advisor Goal
Knomee Opportunity
Warm Lead
Newsletter · Event · Social
Researching options. Interested, but not yet convinced to take action.
Increase engagement.
Schedule a meeting.
Earn the meeting with early value delivery and create a more engaged prospect.
Hot Lead
Referral · Direct · Meeting set
Ready to engage. Has completed research or received a trusted referral.
Increase conversion rate.
Demonstrate differentiation.
Accelerate trust.
Make the first meeting feel like the tenth by uncovering priorities and motivations in advance.
Engaged Client
Active relationship
Engaged with the advisor and financial plan. Responsive and open to guidance.
Improve advisor preparation.
Strengthen relationship.
Increase share of wallet.
Unlock insights to surface opportunities, deepen relationships, and engage the broader family.
Disengaged Client
At-risk relationship
Less responsive, declines meetings. Showing signs of reduced engagement.
Reopen communication.
Strengthen relationship.
Retain assets.
Restart meaningful conversations before the relationship drifts.

Hot Lead

How to Use
Knomee:
Hot Lead

For prospects who've agreed to meet but aren't convinced yet. Build trust and close with a more meaningful first conversation.

Prospect Mindset
"I've requested information or agreed to meet, but I'm not convinced this advisor is the one yet."
Advisor Goal
🤝 Build trust💵 Close the sale
Sources
📧 Email👤 Current client🤝 Referral🌐 Website
Marketing Strategy
1
Meeting confirmation email — invite to Knomee📧 Email
2
Reminder (2 days before) — Knomee not completed📧 Email
3
Reminder (2 days before) — Knomee completed📧 Email
4
Meeting follow-up email — prospect not closed yet📧 Email
© Knomee | ConfidentialPage 6

Sample Outreach — Meeting Confirmation
Option 1 · Existing Trust
Mail — Inbox
A
Advisor Name <advisor@acme.com>
To: [First Name]
Today, 9:41 AM
Looking forward to our meeting

Hi [First Name],

I'm looking forward to our meeting. Before we get together, I'd like to invite you to spend 10 minutes with Knomee — a guided experience that helps clarify what matters most to you and identify your top financial questions.

Most financial conversations start with your money. This one starts with you.

I'll review your responses so our time together stays focused on what matters most.

Access your Knomee experience here →
Best,
[Advisor Name]
Acme Financial Advisors
Option 2 · Research-Backed
Mail — Inbox
A
Advisor Name <advisor@acme.com>
To: [First Name]
Today, 9:41 AM
Looking forward to our meeting

Hi [First Name],

I'm looking forward to our meeting. Before we get together, I'd like to invite you to spend 10 minutes with Knomee — a guided experience developed with leading experts in financial psychology and behavioral finance.

Rather than a financial questionnaire, you'll gain clarity around your goals, priorities, and the questions that matter most to you.

Most financial conversations start with your money. This one starts with you.

Access your Knomee experience here →
Best,
[Advisor Name]
Acme Financial Advisors

Warm Lead

For prospects who are researching but not yet ready to act. Earn the meeting through early value delivery.

Advisor Goal
📅 Schedule a meeting 💬 Engage with content

📧 Newsletter 🎟 Event ▶️ Videos

1
Warm email nurture strategy📧 Email

Newsletter content (non-clients)📰 Newsletter

Event follow-up email🎟 Event

Website landing page — from CTA or direct navigation🌐 Web

Videos, client case studies▶️ Social / Video

Sample Outreach — Warm Email Nurture
Option 1
Mail — Inbox
A
Advisor Name <advisor@acme.com>
To: [First Name]
Today, 9:41 AM
Financial planning should start with you

Hi [First Name],

At Acme, we believe great financial advice starts with understanding what matters most to you — not just your assets, but your goals, priorities, and the life you want to build.

That's why we've introduced a complimentary experience powered by Knomee, designed to help you gain clarity about what matters most.

Start your Knomee experience →
Best,
[Advisor Name]
Acme Financial Advisors

Most financial tools start with your money.

We've partnered with Knomee to help you reflect on your goals, values, and what you want your money to make possible. It takes about 10 minutes.

Sample Outreach — LinkedIn / Social

A scroll-stopping social post that leads with a human truth and routes interest to a single Knomee call to action.

A
Acme Financial Advisors
3,418 followers
Promoted ·
···
For most of our lives, we trade our time for money — yet we spend almost none of it getting clear on what that money is actually for.

That's the conversation most financial advice skips. So we built a better starting point. …more
What is your money really for?
WITH ACME ADVISORS
In about 10 minutes, Knomee helps you get clear on your goals, values, and the three money questions that matter most — before we ever talk numbers.
DISCOVER FINANCIAL JOY
acme.knomee.com/discover
👍❤💡 312
47 comments · 21 reposts
👍 Like
💬 Comment
🔁 Repost
➤ Send
Why this works
Anatomy of a high-performing post
1
Lead with a human truth, not a pitch
The opening line earns the scroll-stop by naming a feeling before a product.
2
Borrow credibility with a strong visual
A real face and a clean card make the post feel editorial, not promotional.
3
Offer one clear call to action
A single Knomee link — no competing asks — so the next step is obvious.
4
Let social proof close
Visible reactions and comments tell the reader that peers found it worthwhile.
💡
Make it yours: swap the headline and photo to match your audience, but keep the Knomee experience as the only call to action.
© Knomee | ConfidentialPage 14
ContentsHotWarmEngagedDisengagedAppendix
Website Landing Page

Place prominently on your website and use as the destination CTA from email campaigns. Fully brandable for your firm.

acme.knomee.com/discover
ACME ADVISORS
Welcome!
Wealth is about experiencing life fully.
Take a few minutes to get clear on what matters most to you.
What you'll get:
⚡
Discover What Matters Most
A quick, guided experience that clarifies your values, goals, and priorities.
💡
See Your Personal Insights
A personalized summary of what's driving your financial decisions.
✨
Get Your 3 Most Important Money Questions
Questions to guide your thinking and your next conversation.
Discover Financial Joy
Est time: 8 min

Engaged Client

How to Use
Knomee:
Engaged Client

For active clients who are responsive and open to guidance. Keep them engaged and deepen the relationship over time.

Prospect Mindset
"I want to stay engaged and make sure my financial priorities are reflected in my plan."
Advisor Goal
🔗 Keep client engaged🌱 Grow the relationship
Sources
📋 Pre check-in✅ Post check-in🗓 Yearly check-in📡 Mid-year pulse🏠 Family alignment
Marketing Strategy
1
Pre check-in meeting — invite to Knomee📧 Email
2
Post check-in meeting follow-up📧 Email
3
Yearly check-in to ensure alignment🗓 Review
4
Mid-year alignment check-in — align on priorities📡 Pulse
5
Family / household alignment prompt🏠 Family

Sample Outreach — Pre-Meeting Invite
Option 1 · Focused review
Mail — Inbox
A
Advisor Name <advisor@acme.com>
To: [First Name]
Today, 9:41 AM
A quick pre-meeting check-in before we connect

Hi [Client First Name],

Ahead of our meeting, I want to make sure our conversation is focused on what matters most to you right now.

Knomee is a brief experience that helps you reflect on your goals, priorities, and what's top of mind. If you have a few minutes, please complete it before we meet:

I'm looking forward to our conversation.

Access your Knomee experience here →
Best,
[Advisor Name]
Acme Financial Advisors

Mail — Inbox
A
Advisor Name <advisor@acme.com>
To: [First Name]
Today, 9:41 AM
Help me make our upcoming review more relevant

Hi [Client First Name],

Before our meeting, I'd like to know if anything has changed since we last spoke.

Knomee is a brief check-in that helps you share your current goals, priorities, and questions. It only takes a few minutes:

Access your Knomee experience here →
Best,
[Advisor Name]
Acme Financial Advisors

How to Use
Knomee:
Disengaged Client

For at-risk clients showing reduced engagement. Reopen communication, rebuild trust, and retain assets before the relationship drifts.

Prospect Mindset
"I don't feel my involvement is helpful or needed — and I'm considering switching advisors."
Advisor Goal
🔄 Reengage client🤝 Rebuild trust💰 Retain assets
Sources
📐 Alignment check-in🎯 Life event✨ Personalization💰 Share-of-wallet

1
Relationship refresh / service personalization — invite to Knomee📧 Email
2
Annual check-in or personalization initiative — invite to Knomee📧 Email
3
Life event check-in — invite to Knomee📧 Email
4
Share of wallet / broader financial picture check-in📧 Email

Mail — Inbox

Advisor Name <advisor@acme.com>
To: [First Name]
Today, 9:41 AM

Hi [Client First Name],

It's been a while since we connected, and I wanted to reach out with a quick check-in.

Rather than assume your priorities are the same, I'd like to give you a simple way to share what's top of mind. Knomee is a brief experience that helps you reflect on what may have changed.

ContentsHotWarmEngagedDisengagedAppendix
Appendix A

Testing CTAs
& Messaging

Experiment with alternate CTAs and messaging to determine what resonates most with your audience before a full launch.

Capturing Testing Data

Knomee supports UTM tags to track source, campaign, and content. Add UTM parameters to invite URLs in ads and emails to track where traffic comes from and test messaging with a pilot group before a full launch.

UTM Implementation
1
Copy the Knomee client or prospect invite URL from the Advisor dashboard.📋 Dashboard
2
Append UTM tags identifying the source, campaign, and messaging.🏷 UTM tags
3
Use Knomee's traffic report to find the most effective medium and messaging, then adapt your plan.📊 Reporting
Campaign
Messaging
URL Format
Email Campaign 1
Messaging 1
https://knomeeurl.com/?utm_source=email&utm_campaign=campaign1&utm_content=messaging1
Email Campaign 1
Messaging 2
https://knomeeurl.com/?utm_source=email&utm_campaign=campaign1&utm_content=messaging2
Email Campaign 1
Messaging 3
https://knomeeurl.com/?utm_source=email&utm_campaign=campaign1&utm_content=messaging3
Selecting a Testing Pool

Test with 10% of your list first. Once you know what works, launch the most effective messaging to the rest.

© Knomee | ConfidentialAppendix A
